title: Range event support package
mission_or_training_goal: Build a range-event planning package that keeps safety, supportability, accountability, and after-action learning aligned.
audience: Company leadership and range support team
constraints: Need for range safety and medical planning discipline
casualty_scenarios: Heat casualty on the firing line
c2_objective: Maintain simple, reliable communications and accountability during a range event without depending on sensitive or complex comm assumptions.
support_objective: Build a broad-stroke logistics and medical support concept that keeps the range event executable.
